title: Quantum Dynamics
text:
Here is the equation we discussed: \[
i\hbar\frac{\partial}{\partial t} \Psi(\mathbf{r},t) = \hat{H} \Psi(\mathbf{r},t)
\]
This was proven by Smith [ReyesHung:2023udr].
